revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初十]][[zh:二月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 10|qq=February 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Eihō|en|Eihō|qid=Q1193881|lt=Eihō|1=Eihō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1081|en|1081|qid=Q19450|lt=1081|1=1081}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōryaku|en|Jōryaku|qid=Q279743|lt=Shōryaku|1=Jōryaku}} to {{ill|Eihō|en|Eihō|qid=Q1193881|lt=Eihō|1=Eihō}} by the {{ill|Xinyou Revolution|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Metal Rooster) (citation needed). * {{ill|Chōji|en|Chōji|qid=Q1150870|lt=Chōji|1=Chōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1104|en|1104|qid=Q12490|lt=1104|1=1104}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōwa (Heian period)|en|Kōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1193890|lt=Kōwa|1=Kōwa (Heian period)}} to {{ill|Chōji|en|Chōji|qid=Q1150870|lt=Chōji|1=Chōji}}. * {{ill|Jōan|ja|承安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōan|1=Shōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11076350}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1172|en|1172|qid=Q19687|lt=1172|1=1172}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – The daughter of {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|en|Taira no Kiyomori|qid=Q281833|lt=Taira no Kiyomori|1=Taira no Kiyomori}}, Tokuko (later known as {{ill|Heitokuko|ja|建礼門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heitokuko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平徳子|1=Taira no Tokuko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3315855}}), became the consort of {{ill|Emperor Takakura|en|Emperor Takakura|qid=Q357261|lt=Emperor Takakura|1=Emperor Takakura}} as {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10875159}}. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1187|en|1187|qid=Q19731|lt=1187|1=1187}} {{ill|March 21|en|March 21|qid=Q2433|lt=March 21|1=March 21}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} fled to the residence of {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidehira|en|Fujiwara no Hidehira|qid=Q3090625|lt=Fujiwara Hidetada|1=Fujiwara no Hidehira}} in Hiraizumi, Ōshu. * {{ill|Kōwa (Heian period)|en|Kōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1193890|lt=Kōwa|1=Kōwa (Heian period)}} 1st year/{{ill|Eitoku|en|Eitoku|qid=Q1145805|lt=Eitoku|1=Eitoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1381|en|1381|qid=Q6331|lt=1381|1=1381}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – Due to the Metal Rooster (辛酉) event, the Southern Court changed the era name from {{ill|Tianshou|en|Tianshou|qid=Q10939676|lt=Tenshū (Japan)|1=Tianshou}} to {{ill|Kōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Kōwa (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1145818|lt=Kōwa|1=Kōwa (Muromachi period)}}. * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1550|en|1550|qid=Q6557|lt=1550|1=1550}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}}) – The event known as the “Nikai Kuzure no Hen” (二階崩れの変) occurred. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – Astronomical observations and calendar-making duties were transferred from the {{ill|Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado clan|lt=Tsuchimikado family|ja|土御門家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado family|qq=}} to a university. == Births == * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|en|Arai Hakuseki|qid=Q467616|lt=Arai Hakuseki|1=Arai Hakuseki}}, a statesman and Confucian scholar of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1725|en|1725|qid=Q6932|lt=1725|1=1725}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1819|en|1819|qid=Q6967|lt=1819|1=1819}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}}) – {{ill|Mōri Takachika|en|Mōri Takachika|qid=Q1088423|lt=Mōri Takatomi|1=Mōri Takachika}}, head of the Chōshū Domain (died {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}) – {{ill|Shinkai Chikutarō|ja|新海竹太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Chikutarō|1=Taketarō Shinkai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11502732}}, a sculptor (died {{ill|1927|en|1927|qid=Q18110|lt=1927|1=1927}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – {{ill|Nishida Tenka|ja|西田天香|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishida Tenka|1=Tenkō Nishida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11629226}}, a religious leader and founder of {{ill|Ichidō-en|ja|一燈園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichidō-en|1=Ittoen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1675336}} (died {{ill|1968|en|1968|qid=Q2644|lt=1968|1=1968}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Senka|en|Emperor Senka|qid=Q329728|lt=Senkatennō|1=Emperor Senka}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|539|en|539|qid=Q32891|lt=539|1=539}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Senka|en|Emperor Senka|qid=Q329728|lt=Senkatennō|1=Emperor Senka}}, the 28th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|qid=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni|1=Mizuno Tadakuni}}, a Rōjū of the Tokugawa shogunate (born {{ill|1794|en|1794|qid=Q7811|lt=1794|1=1794}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|9|2|11|1|10|3|2|0210|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|2月10日 (旧暦)|version=82900091|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:2 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 10 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 10일]] [[ja:2月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初十]]
[[ar:February 10 (Lunisolar)]]
